hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $p = if ($env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR) { $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR } else { '.' }; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 -LiteralPath (Join-Path $p '.claude/context/RHYFFLE_CONTEXT.md')"
